goal: Move apps/portfolio-v2 → apps/species/portfolio-v2. Operator directive: portfolio-v2 is a species being dogfooded (phase 50), not a top-level app. (1) mkdir apps/species if missing. (2) git mv apps/portfolio-v2 apps/species/portfolio-v2. (3) Update root pnpm-workspaces config to include apps/species/* if not already wildcarded. (4) grep -rl '@portfolio/v2' or 'apps/portfolio-v2' across monorepo and fix paths/package refs. (5) Update root package.json scripts dev:portfolio-v2, build:portfolio-v2 to filter-pattern that still matches @portfolio/v2 (since package name stays the same, most things should just work). (6) Verify pnpm install clean + typecheck.
